$comment: MCP server registry for Claude and Codex. Disabled entries are operational tombstones: sync removes them from live configuration while preserving why they were rejected.
_context7_disabled: context7 MCP disabled 2026-06-09 — replaced by the `ctx7` CLI (`npx ctx7 library <name>` + `ctx7 docs <id>`, full 1:1 parity with the MCP's two tools). Docs lookup now needs no always-on MCP tax and is universal across every shell-capable agent, not patchy per-vendor. (was: https://mcp.context7.com/mcp, targets cursor/gemini)
_playwright_disabled: playwright MCP disabled 2026-06-09 — browser automation lives in the CLI layer instead (playwright framework for deterministic tests + agent-browser CLI for agent-driven browsing, pinchtab on standby for human-in-the-loop authed sessions). No always-on MCP context tax. (was: npx @playwright/mcp@latest, targets: claude/cursor/codex/gemini)
_linear_disabled: Linear MCP disabled 2026-05-07 — re-enable if needed (was: https://mcp.linear.app/mcp, targets: claude/cursor/codex)
_notion_disabled: Notion MCP disabled 2026-05-07 — re-enable if needed (was: https://mcp.notion.com/mcp, targets: claude/cursor/codex)
_datadog_disabled: Datadog MCP disabled 2026-05-07 — re-enable if needed (was: https://mcp.datadoghq.com/api/unstable/mcp-server/mcp, headers DD_API_KEY/DD_APPLICATION_KEY, targets: cursor)
_chrome_devtools_disabled: chrome-devtools MCP disabled 2026-05-07 — overlap with playwright + pinchtab CLI (was: npx chrome-devtools-mcp@latest, targets: claude/cursor/codex)
_neon_disabled: Neon MCP disabled 2026-04-09 — revisit when actively using Neon projects
